title: Teleport Cakes
description: This mod adds cakes for teleportation between various dimensions. It's very suitable for players who don't want to find the End portal and survive on an sky island.
body:
## 📖 About:
Are you tired of making a special trip to look for the End portal? This mod adds a cake for teleportation. Eating it can transport you to a specific dimension, which solves this problem very well and is highly compatible with survival on the sky island.

The teleport cakes can teleportation between various dimensions, Including Nether, Overword and The End.

At The teleportation destinations of Nether and The End, Obsidian platforms and Overworld cake will be placed for return.

#### After mod version v3.0.0 (mc: 1.21.1, 26.1.x):
You can craft three portable teleport cupcakes: the **Overworld Cupcake**, **Nether Cupcake**, and **End Cupcake**, each transporting the player directly to its corresponding dimension when eaten. 

In addition, the **Aggregate Cupcake** is a reusable advanced version that can switch between multiple target dimensions, making it a flexible all-in-one teleport item for travel and exploration.

![Aggregate Cupcake recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04c20322ec4c8d372a1c59c741e939abf1942a59_0.webp)

#### After mod version v2.1.0 (mc: 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.11, 26.1.x):
Nether Cake now creates a single Nether spawn platform the first time it’s used, then reuses that exact platform for every later teleport (for all players in the same world).

The platform is maintained on each teleport: it clears a small 3x3x3 airspace above the platform to prevent suffocation and keeps the cake usable, even if players build protective structures around it.

## 🎨 Image
![Teleport Cakes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7bUTRQPV/images/9de51a27387d5f00bbb84ed2f5b7dd3c1b348b1d.png)

![teleportation destinations](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1214/488/2025-06-08_19-05-36-2-png.png)

![Cloth config screen](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1649/613/a34aa34c_2026-04-26_110936_832-png.png)

## 🥁 Minecraft version support status

| Status                                             | Mod Loader | Versions                           |
|----------------------------------------------------|------------|------------------------------------|
| Currently Actively Maintained MC Versions    | Fabric     | 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.11, 26.1+     |
|                                                    | NeoForge   | 1.21.1, 1.21.11, 26.1+            |
| Other MC Versions                           | -          | Only critical bug fixes; no new features |

All assets of this project are licensed under CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0, and the license for the source code is GNU GPLv3.

Meanwhile, you can use this mod for modpack, but you need to indicate the source and credit.

# 中文
## 📖 关于
您是否厌倦了专程跑去寻找末地传送门？该模组添加了一种用于传送的蛋糕，食用可以将您传送至特定的维度，它很好的解决了这个问题，同时也为空岛生存提供了便利。

跃迁蛋糕可以用于主世界、下界和末地之间的传送。

与其他模组的联动将在后续的版本中添加。

有些中文的信息在我自己网站的[该项目页（https://i.ilov.top/mods/teleportcakes）](https://i.ilov.top/mods/teleportcakes)更新的更及时，可以看看。
